_comment: Canonical state of the First-Blood board. This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. On a solve: set status to "solved" and fill solver/method/writeup AND the recovered "k" (as a decimal string), then run `python3 site/build.py` (CI also runs it on deploy). A "solved" entry is REJECTED unless k actually recovers the log (k·G == Q on its instance) — the generator and CI both re-verify it, so a claimed solve cannot reach the board without a real, re-checkable proof. The generator regenerates the board in site/index.html AND the table in first_blood/README.md from this file, so they can never drift. status is "open" or "solved".
